subcodes.first_line: This is a Book that speaketh with truth, and therein is that which causeth tears to flow from the eyes of them that are near, and verily it hath been sent down from on high [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب ینطق بالحق و فیه ما یجری الدموع عن عیون المقربین و انه لتنزیل نزلت
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
